title: grilled energizing portuguese chicken grill
description: a sour, cheese-pull, energizing portuguese dish featuring gelatine leaves, grilled to perfection. great for a quick buddhist temple-friendly meal or snack.

ingredients.name: boneless chicken breast
ingredients.notes: about 1 pound total, cut into 6-8 pieces

instructions: preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
season the chicken pieces with chicken seasoning and black pepper.
brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
add the chicken to the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, flipping halfway through.
while the chicken cooks, whisk together lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, and minced garlic in a small bowl.
once the chicken is cooked, brush with the lemon-garlic mixture and set aside.
soak the gelatine leaves in cold water for 5 minutes, then cut into thin strips.
arrange the gelatine strips on a plate or tray.
place the cooked chicken on top of the gelatine, followed by a drizzle of melted vegan mozzarella cheese.
garnish with chopped fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.
